path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\01. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: I mean it's a classic I guess
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 02. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (Hurry Up!).mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\02. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (Hurry Up!).mp3
description: Still a classic.
title: Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (Hurry Up!)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\03. Ground Theme - Super Mario Series.mp3
description: A medley of the four tracks, all of which are in as individual tracks, unceremoniously faded in and out as the Mario Maker stage morphs.
title: Ground Theme - Super Mario Series
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Super Mario Bros. / Super Mario Bros. 3 / Super Mario World / New Super Mario Bros. U

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\04. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (64).mp3
description: Love this fun remix! Those drums make me wanna shake my shoulders. It's cute, it's fun, it's a pleasure.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\05. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (Melee).mp3
description: Classic banger from Princess Peach's Castle from Melee. The orchestral performance of this on the Smashing Live CD is what made me appreciate this remix.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\07. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. (Brawl).mp3
description: This is a bit of left-field contribution from Koji Kondo but I kinda dig it. I often find myself singing 'it's something unpredictable, but in the end is right' to the little piano melody.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\08. Ground Theme 2 - Super Mario Bros. (Brawl).mp3
description: I had blocked this remix from my memory! No wonder they removed it because it sounds like total shit.
title: Ground Theme 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 09. Ground Theme (Band Performance) - Super Mario Bros..mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\09. Ground Theme (Band Performance) - Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: Some live band music from Odyssey, why not. I didn't include the songs with individual instruments, you don't need to listen to this song that many times.
title: Ground Theme (Band Performance)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 14. Ground Theme & Underground Theme - Super Mario Bros..mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\14. Ground Theme & Underground Theme - Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: This one is a genuine hit. The drums at the start? So good. Salsa piano? Hello. The groovy underground part? Sexy as fuck.
title: Ground Theme / Underground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\15. Underground Theme - Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: God DAMN! It's an actual old-school hip-hop remix of the underground theme and it fucking slaps. It originally played in the Mushroomy Kingdom underground section (R.I.P. did not make it to Ultimate). I love the water droplet effects.
title: Underground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\16. Underwater Theme - Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: Cool little fake out with the NES theme. It's alright, it's fun.
title: Underwater Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\17. Super Mario Bros. Medley.mp3
description: Koji Kondo giving us another kinda confounding remix of this music. It's not as good as his Brawl one.
title: Super Mario Bros. Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 18. Super Mario Bros. - The Lost Levels Medley.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\18. Super Mario Bros. - The Lost Levels Medley.mp3
description: A medley starting with the lesser-heard ending theme. But I never understood why this is a medley of the lost levels when the music is just the same as the original.
title: Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\19. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
description: A doo-wap barbershop style version of this song which definitely works. I'm just not excited to listen to it.
title: Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\20. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
description: It's alright as far as these NES themes go.
title: Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\21. Rolling Hills A.mp3
description: I think this remix of the Super Mario Bros 2 theme is very mid.
title: Rolling Hills A
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Mario vs. Donkey Kong: Tipping Stars

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\22. Boss Theme - Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
description: Wild that they added this theme to Ultimate. I don't think people understand how annoying it is. It's like a 10 second loop.
title: Boss Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\25. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 3 (Melee).mp3
description: A rockabilly remix from way back when. Love the piano breakdown, and the reggae vibe into Hawaiian holiday vibe. A lot to enjoy.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\23. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: It's a laid-back rock/reggae remix and for that's quite good. I like when it builds up before the chiptune, and I like the drums.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\24. Ground Theme - Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: This is another classic NES chiptune for the Mario Maker stage. It's alright. For some reason this was only on the Wii U, they removed it for Ultimate.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\27. Super Mario Bros. 3 Medley.mp3
description: I think this remix is pretty shit. I feel like you could put this on for 10 hours and torture someone with it.
title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\28. Fortress Boss - Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: Super excellent and intense remix of this banger boss theme. All those mushroom 1-up sounds just adding this chaotic energy to the track, it just keeps getting wilder and wilder. Throwing in the Ice World theme as a bonus too, great.
title: Fortress Boss
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\29. Airship Theme - Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: Used for all of Bowser's scenes in the Subspace Emissary, this is iconic. I don't think it makes for a nice listen when you're playing smash though. That being said, it does get pretty crazy towards the end.
title: Airship Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\31. King Bowser - Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: Banger remix! Love the bongos and percussion. Koji's back and he took a simple track and made it super intense.
title: King Bowser
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\32. Underground Theme - Super Mario Land.mp3
description: Big tune. Big remix too. Loved this in the Subspace Emissary. Bit of a shame that there is no other Super Mario Land music in the game.
title: Underground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\33. Title & Ending - Super Mario World.mp3
description: The original music here is great but I don't feel like the remix brings much to the table.
title: Title/Ending
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\34. Ground Theme - Super Mario World.mp3
description: Another plain mario theme for the Mario Maker stage. It's one of the better ones.
title: Ground Theme - Super Mario World
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\35. Super Mario World Medley.mp3
description: It's so great that this has the victory theme going into a genuinely fun Starman theme. Otherwise this remix is alright.
title: Super Mario World Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 36. Castle Theme & Fortress Boss - Super Mario World & Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\36. Castle Theme & Fortress Boss - Super Mario World & Super Mario Bros. 3.mp3
description: Absolutely huge track, the original is an all-timer and then you have this incredible remix. I had an mp3 of this on my mp3 player when I was younger. It just goes so hard. I've heard it so many times but only now do I realise it's a mashup with the Fortress Boss theme from SMB3 (not to be confused with Super Mario World's Fortress Boss), instead of doing the whole castle song. Interesting.
title: Castle / Boss Fortress - Super Mario World
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Super Mario World / Super Mario Bros. 3

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\37. Fortress Boss - Super Mario World.mp3
description: Awesome flamenco remix of this track which lowkey has flamenco vibes in it anyway. It's perfect. I love the muted trumpet. It gives me a stank face when I'm listening to it.
title: Fortress Boss
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\38. Main Theme - Super Mario 64.mp3
description: This is honestly a great remix. It's not doing too crazy but it takes a classic track and elevates it.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\39. Main Theme - Super Mario 64.mp3
description: Can't touch the original, it's so good. It's a bop. It's the biggest bop.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\40. Slide.mp3
description: Better known as the music from Rainbow Cruise. It's alright! They throw in a bonus SMB Underwater theme like so many of these remixes.
title: Slide
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\41. Slide.mp3
description: Silly goose music! This is the original and it's great.
title: Slide
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\42. Delfino Plaza.mp3
description: Great little remix of this classic! I loved that they went to older stages and gave them new remixes like this. Accordion solo is great.
title: Delfino Plaza
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\43. Delfino Plaza.mp3
description: The original is so simple and good. It's kinda goofy too, especially with that big honk of the accordion at the end. I find the ultra-loud yoshi drums overbearing though.
title: Delfino Plaza
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\44. Ricco Harbor.mp3
description: I always felt like the saxophones in this sound clown-like and silly, like they're imitating fart noises. It's a cool little ska song but why with these saxophones? The Yoshi drums are too loud.
title: Ricco Harbor
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 45. Main Theme - New Super Mario Bros..mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\45. Main Theme - New Super Mario Bros..mp3
description: I genuinely love this theme, I think it might be the best main Mario theme. This remix doesn't do too much but modernises it just a little bit. The percussion break down is fun.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\46. Super Mario Galaxy.mp3
description: It's the orchestral opening of the first Galaxy, and it doesn't cause any emotions in me to stir. It bothers me that in the game, it ends and then starts again after a long pause.
title: Super Mario Galaxy
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\47. Egg Planet.mp3
description: This remix sounds so similar to the original that it's almost not worth commenting on. It's fine. The underground/starman bit is alright.
title: Egg Planet
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\48. Egg Planet.mp3
description: The original Egg Planet is kinda weak compared to other heavy hitters in the soundtrack. It's alright I guess.
title: Egg Planet
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 49. Rosalina in the Observatory & Luma's Theme.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\49. Rosalina in the Observatory & Luma's Theme.mp3
description: A cutesy girly remix for the princesses out there. I personally don't love it.
title: Rosalina in the Observatory / Luma's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\50. Gusty Garden Galaxy.mp3
description: The real heavy hitter from Galaxy 1. It's honestly great. Sometimes I wonder why this comes so late in the game when its music is arguably the most iconic in the whole game.
title: Gusty Garden Galaxy
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\51. Champion Road.mp3
description: A remix of Gusty Garden from 3D World, but honestly it just adds some ugly guitars and shit drums.
title: Champion Road
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\52. Theme of SMG2.mp3
description: Similar to the orchestral opening to the first game, this one also doesn't inspire me much.
title: Theme of SMG2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\53. The Starship Sails.mp3
description: This is a nice track from the second game, one of the few new ones they added for Ultimate.
title: The Starship Sails
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\54. Sky Station.mp3
description: It's a shame, they should have put in Yoshi Star Galaxy instead of this... This is like Egg Galaxy it's just generic.
title: Sky Station
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\55. Melty Monster.mp3
description: Some great lava level representation with this one. I think I love Galaxy 1's lava level more but this is still great. The build up!
title: Melty Monster
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\56. Bowser's Galaxy Generator.mp3
description: This is kinda epic. It's not too bad at all.
title: Bowser's Galaxy Generator
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\57. Fated Battle.mp3
description: This Bowser battle music is unnecessarily dramatic! With choir and everything I find myself rolling my eyes.
title: Fated Battle
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 58. Ground Theme & Underwater Theme - Super Mario 3D Land.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\58. Ground Theme & Underwater Theme - Super Mario 3D Land.mp3
description: I honestly think this remix sounds like shit. This game didn't have much going for it and didn't deserve a stage in smash.
title: Ground Theme / Underwater Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Super Mario 3D Land / Super Mario Bros.

filename: 61. Athletic Theme - New Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\61. Athletic Theme - New Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
description: Man this remix has nothing on the other one for NSMB. There's nothing that makes this especially from NSMB2 either so I don't know what that's about.
title: Athletic Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 62. Ground Theme - New Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\62. Ground Theme - New Super Mario Bros. 2.mp3
description: I can't think why they would put this inferior version of this with the horrible voices over the original from NSBM1. What were they thinking?
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 63. Ground Theme - New Super Mario Bros. U.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\63. Ground Theme - New Super Mario Bros. U.mp3
description: This one is really neither here nor there. It's not as good as the original NSBM one.
title: Ground Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\64. Super Bell Hill.mp3
description: A fun, jazzy Mario theme. It's cute.
title: Super Bell Hill
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\65. The Great Tower Showdown 2.mp3
description: It's going for epic but with that instrumentation it sounds a bit silly. Then the tinny drums fade away for just orchestra and it all feels a bit arbitrary.
title: The Great Tower Showdown 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\66. Title Theme - Super Mario Maker.mp3
description: This remix is alright! It doesn't do very much with the source material, but it's alright.
title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\67. Fossil Falls.mp3
description: I never liked this music that much, it's just generic.
title: Fossil Falls
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\68. New Donk City.mp3
description: Banger jazz track that is lowkey better than Jump Up Super Star if you ask me.
title: New Donk City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\69. Jump Up, Super Star!.mp3
description: It is good, they made a classic with this one. The game also has versions with just the instruments on their own but we don't need to listen to them here.
title: Jump Up, Super Star!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\75. Steam Gardens.mp3
description: One of the better tracks from Odyssey for sure. They went for a breakbeat thing together with Western-style guitar and it works. It's groovy.
title: Steam Gardens
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\76. Underground Moon Caverns.mp3
description: Love it, the reveal in the game when you go below the surface of the moon, great. Some good lava level coverage here with this.
title: Underground Moon Caverns
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\77. Break Free (Lead The Way).mp3
description: God I actively hate this song. It sounds like they were trying to appeal to Avril Lavigne fans. It's cheesy in a bad way and I hate it.
title: Break Free (Lead The Way)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\78. Gritzy Desert.mp3
description: Shoutouts to Yoko Shimamura for remixing this obscure desert music from Mario & Luigi. It's great. I still haven't played the game but I think fondly of the one level in Subspace Emissary which featured this music.
title: Gritzy Desert
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\79. Tough Guy Alert!.mp3
description: I think this one sounds pretty all over the place. Not a great listen.
title: Tough Guy Alert!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\80. The Grand Finale.mp3
description: Of course Yoko Shimamura made this because it sounds just like Kingdom Hearts. I don't think it's a crazy good as people say it is, but then again I never played the game.
title: The Grand Finale
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\81. Paper Mario Medley.mp3
description: Tragic that there's just one Paper Mario remix in the whole game and it's this, consisting of two shitty Sticker Star tracks. But it's all worth it for that gorgeous Rogueport remix. Hell yes. For 30 seconds or so we are living the dream.
title: Paper Mario Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Paper Mario: Sticker Star / Paper Mario: The Thousand Year Door

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\85. Try, Try Again.mp3
description: Another cheeky Yoko Shimamura remix of her own music. I don't think this one is very good though. Gritzy Desert was better.
title: Try, Try Again
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\86. Time's Running Out!.mp3
description: I think this sounds pretty shit. It's so billowy and echoey.
title: Time's Running Out!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\87. Mixed-Up Scramble.mp3
description: This game did not have the sauce, and neither does this music.
title: Mixed-Up Scramble
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\88. Attack and Run!.mp3
description: This music sounds pretty shit, just like the other ones from this game. Why do the instruments sound so loud and echoey and overbearing?
title: Attack and Run!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\89. Battle! - Paper Mario - Color Splash.mp3
description: I didn't love the game but this battle theme is great. Not quite up there with Origami King's battle theme but we take it.
title: Battle!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\90. This is Minion Turf!.mp3
description: This is again pretty shit. Maybe it's to do with the 3DS that is sounds so bad. But also the music is just bad. Also this game mode was shit, I regretted buying it.
title: This is Minion Turf!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Mario & Luigi: Superstar Saga + Bowser's Minions

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\91. Pandemonium.mp3
description: This is such a non-song. Mario Party games not known for their music and here we see why.
title: Pandemonium
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 92. Title Theme - Mario Party - Island Tour.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\92. Title Theme - Mario Party - Island Tour.mp3
description: I hadn't even realised that they added this to Ultimate. This 3DS game was a non-game and this music really has nothing going for it.
title: Title Theme
composers: Rei Kondoh, Sara Sakurai, Satoshi Okubo
contributors: Rei Kondoh, Sara Sakurai, Satoshi Okubo
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\93. Rocket Road.mp3
description: This is marginally better than the title theme but I'm still asking myself why did they put this in smash? It does have a cheeky Gusty Garden reference.
title: Rocket Road
composers: Rei Kondoh, Sara Sakurai, Satoshi Okubo
contributors: Rei Kondoh, Sara Sakurai, Satoshi Okubo
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\94. Mario Tennis & Mario Golf.mp3
description: I never played these games, which is tragic because apparently they're quite good. This remix sounds shit at first, but it actually gets better.
title: Mario Tennis / Mario Golf
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
original-game: Mario Power Tennis / Mario Golf: Toadstool Tour

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\95. World Tour.mp3
description: Music from a pretty shitty 3DS game. I think it sounds pretty bad.
title: World Tour
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

filename: 96. Stadium Theme - Mario Tennis - Ultra Smash.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\96. Stadium Theme - Mario Tennis - Ultra Smash.mp3
description: I don't think anyone's gonna have nostalgia for this music. I think most people agree that this is the worst Mario Tennis, and the biggest criticism was that everything was boring and generic, just like this music.
title: Stadium Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\97. Kingdom Stadium - Night.mp3
description: This music is over the top and sounds like shit.
title: Kingdom Stadium: Night
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\98. Country Field - away team.mp3
description: I just don't feel like this has much going for it at all. I guess marginally better than the other one from this obscure-ass game.
title: Country Field: Away Team
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\99. Title Theme - Mario Tennis Aces.mp3

title: Title Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\100. Stadium Theme - Mario Tennis Aces.mp3
description: This song is totally forgettable and lame. It has crowd SFX in it that I don't like.
title: Stadium Theme - Mario Tennis Aces
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\101. Main Theme - Luigi's Mansion.mp3
description: Kinda alright remix, a bit more appropriate than the other one for smash. Has lots of different phases and vibes, it's great.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\102. Main Theme - Luigi's Mansion (Brawl).mp3
description: Great that they had this music for smash. Such a vibe duking it out to creepy music box music. Love the organ.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

title: On the Hunt -Gloomy Manor Ver.- (Instrumental)

description: Pretty wild that this remix contains Mozart at the start. Have to say I don't love the music though.
title: Mario Bros.
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\106. Fever.mp3
description: It's a classic and the only real reason why people know this music. I once played this on piano for youtube and got 100,000 views.
title: Fever
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\108. Chill (Brawl).mp3
description: Actually pretty good. Kinda rocking. Takes you places. Can't believe they added a remix but removed the character. Had to make a compromise and put in the picture from Smash 4.
title: Chill
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\109. Chill (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: I'm not sure if I'm a fan of all those guitar scratches and bleeps and bloops. I like that it's experimental, but it really is kinda crazy.
title: Chill
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 02 - Super Mario (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\110. Mario Paint Medley.mp3

title: Mario Paint Medley
composers: Hirokazu Tanaka, Ryoji Yoshitomi, Kazumi Totaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 02: Super Mario
